title: Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 2
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' 2|notoc=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:Classic_rotj2.jpg]] |title=''Classic Star Wars:
Return of the Jedi'' 2 |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=[[Al Williamson]], [[Carlos Garzón]] |inker=[[Al Williamson]], [[Carlos Garzón]] |letterer=[[Ed King]] |colorist=[[Perry McNamee]] |cover artist=[[Al Williamson]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[November]] [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-821/Classic-Star-Wars-Return-of-the-Jedi-2|text=Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi #2}} |other date= |media type= |pages=38 |isbn=none |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |series=[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (comic series)|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] |issues=2 |preceded by=[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]] |followed by= }} '''''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' 2''' collects the last two issues of the [[Marvel Comics]]' adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Dark Horse presents ''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'', the latest chapter in the greatest space fantasy ever! The Rebel Alliance must destroy the Empire's new Death Star before it is completed, but their attack is foreseen by the Emperor, himself a master of the Force, and anticipated with deadly plans. Can young Luke Skywalker destroy his own father to save the Galaxy from the Emperor's crushing grip?'' ==Contents== *[[Return of the Jedi 3|''Return of the Jedi'' 3]] *[[Return of the Jedi 4|''Return of the Jedi'' 4]] ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 2}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Classic_rotj2.jpg|Cover File:CSW-RotJ2-CoverArt.png|Cover art ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi - The Special Edition]]'' *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 6]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Rebellion Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-821/Classic-Star-Wars-Return-of-the-Jedi-2|text=Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi #2}} {{Interlang |es=Classic Star Wars: El Retorno del Jedi 2 |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ჯედაის დაბრუნება 2 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi issues|02]]
